---
title: "“The Literature Department.”   The Girls’ Friendly Society. Sixth Winchester Diocesan Meeting."
---

## “The Literature Department.”   The Girls’ Friendly Society. Sixth Winchester Diocesan Meeting.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** article in conference proceedings

**Publisher:** Winchester: Warren & Son. October 1882: 41-42

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
